tools.name: enrich_company
tools.description:
Enrich a company by domain name. Returns company name, country, contact
emails, phone numbers, and social media profiles (LinkedIn, Twitter/X,
Facebook, Instagram, YouTube).

tools.name: enrich_company_by_name
tools.description:
Enrich a company by name (partial match). Returns company domain, country,
contact emails, phone numbers, and social media profiles.
